title: Question Words
description: Learn the most common question words in Bulgarian and how to answer them naturally.

content.title: Core Question Words
content.description: These words appear constantly in conversation, so they are worth learning early.

content.title: Quick tip
content.text: In Bulgarian, question words usually stay near the start of the sentence, which makes them easy to spot.

content.title: Common Question Patterns
content.description: These are simple templates you can reuse in real conversation.

content.title: Ask a question in three steps
bullets: Finish with the rest of the sentence if needed.

content.title: Natural Answers
content.description: Short answers help your speech sound more natural and less robotic.

content.note: A useful question when ordering or asking for something on a table.
This is one of the most useful real-world questions.

content.title: Practice Set
content.description: Use cards and a quiz to lock in the main question words.

content.question: Which word means 'whose'?
content.note: It is easy to confuse with 'кой', but it asks about possession.
